title: Algerian Tomato Frittata
description: A flavorful North African-inspired frittata made with tomatoes and spices.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat a tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the diced tomato and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and ras el hanout.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked tomatoes and sprinkle with feta cheese.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
